case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. CASEY E FABIANI et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT FABIANI, CASEY E DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-05-2011

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-25-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
